varchar(255), last_modified_by varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table tenants ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, Hibernate: create table users ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, email varchar(255) not null unique, full_name
